description_long: This object is a fixed-blade knife displayed horizontally atop a large, rectangular wooden block. The knife features a straight-edged, single-edged blade with a sharp angular tip, likely made of polished steel, and a wooden handle with a natural grain pattern and two visible metal rivets. The handle is ergonomically shaped, slightly contoured for grip, and has a warm, brown coloration. A prominent black metal guard separates the blade from the handle, providing safety and a visual break between materials. The wooden block beneath the knife is weathered, with visible grain, cracks, and a rough texture, serving as a sturdy display or storage base. The overall appearance suggests a handcrafted or artisanal tool, suitable for kitchen or utility use, with a rustic aesthetic.
description: A straight-edged knife with a wooden handle and metal guard, mounted on a weathered wooden block. The blade is polished steel, and the handle features visible rivets and natural wood grain.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the knife, the straight blade, wooden handle with two rivets, and the black guard, all resting on a rectangular wooden block.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the thinness of the blade, the alignment of the handle, and the width of the wooden block.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the other side of the knife and handle, with similar features visible.
description_view_3: End-on view showing the thickness of the wooden block, the end of the handle, and the guard protruding from the block.
attribute_handle_design: contoured wooden handle with visible grain and two metal rivets
